title: exorhopala ruficeps
intro: Exorhopala ruficeps is a plant species within the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the staff tree or staffvine. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Exorhopala ruficeps has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infused in hot water, or used as a paste to apply topically for its medicinal properties.
